プロジェクトチーム内でのファイル共有は、業務効率に直結する重要な要素です。FS!: Efficient file sharing within a project team is critical to productivity. FS!QR lets you quickly and securely distribute key documents — design drawings, specifications, progress reports, and more. This is especially valuable in collaborative projects with external partners, where traditional email attachments or cloud account sharing can be impractical. A simple QR code and password is all that's needed. And because files are temporary by design, the risk of data leaks after a project wraps up is kept to a minimum.

Pre-distributing meeting materials or sharing last-minute references is just as easy: display a QR code in your video conferencing tool and participants can access it from their own devices.
企業におけるファイル共有では、コンプライアンス要件とセキュリティ管理が重要な課題: Compliance and security management matter in corporate file sharing. FS!QR combines encrypted storage for QR-code shared files, access control, and automatic deletion to support safer temporary sharing workflows. It can be useful for temporary handoff of audit materials, limited distribution of sensitive technical documents, and careful transfer of files containing personal information, subject to your organization's own policies.

When rolling out FS!QR across an organization, establishing usage guidelines, training employees, and conducting regular security audits are all essential steps. With the right practices in place, you can boost operational efficiency and manage risk at the same time — contributing to your organization's broader digital transformation. 社内研修やプロジェクト共有では、一時的に大容量の資料を扱うことがあります。FS!: Internal training and project collaboration often involve handling large volumes of materials on a temporary basis. FS!QR stores uploaded files in encrypted form, and only members who know the ID and password can retrieve them via QR code or URL. For onboarding new employees, lecture slides, exercise data, and reference videos can be distributed efficiently — trainees get instant access on their own devices, maximizing the impact of the session. Department-specific training programs benefit equally: specialized materials are shared securely, and the automatic deletion feature removes the burden of post-training data management.
